current_baseline.latest_accepted_milestone: Daily Coach Async Approved Preview Bridge Implementation v1 — Feature Flag Disabled by Default
current_baseline.prior_accepted_milestone: Daily Coach Async Approved Preview Bridge Design v1

active_roadmap.current_authorized_milestone: Daily Coach Async Approved Preview Bridge QA v1
active_roadmap.current_authorized_status: AUTHORIZED FOR QA HARDENING / TEST IMPLEMENTATION
active_roadmap.current_authorized_scope: Hard-test approved preview bridge behavior, eligibility gates, no-provider-call guarantees, no-async-job-creation guarantees, and metadata boundaries without expanding product behavior.
active_roadmap.recommended_next_milestone_after_accepta: Daily Coach Async Provider Live QA v1 — Developer Mode Only
active_roadmap.next_milestone_reason: Provider live QA must remain Developer Mode-only; provider execution from Today remains unauthorized.

linux: Linux runtime uses Windows Ollama over LAN

commands.app: Windows PowerShell command that talks to Linux over SSH and restarts FastAPI + Streamlit there

model_provider_policy.qwen3_32b: research / future premium async candidate only
model_provider_policy.model_promotion: No model promoted without Architecture approval.
model_provider_policy.boundary: Backend owns truth; provider proposes language; validator decides display safety.

daily_coach_async_boundary.current: Approved preview bridge QA hardening exists; bridge remains disabled by default and Today reads only approved persisted narratives without provider calls or async job creation.
in_current_scope: read-only approved narrative eligibility gate tests
Developer Mode diagnostics gated and sanitized
deferred: Daily Coach Async Provider Live QA v1 — Developer Mode Only
provider execution from Today remains unauthorized
public/default async narrative display remains unauthorized
worker / queue / scheduler / polling remains unauthorized

codex_assisted_flow.backend_user_role: review, validate, stage explicit files, commit, push, snapshot, Linux pull, and hand off to Architecture after Codex finishes
codex_assisted_flow.default: chat-driven Backend implementation using apply scripts/patches

workflow_rules.feature_flow: commit -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull feature
workflow_rules.main_flow: merge -> validate -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull main

definition_of_done: project memory updated when behavior, architecture, tests, UI, provider behavior, persistence, routing, runtime commands, or accepted status changes
